MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.'S RESPONSE TO THE ANSWER IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 16, 2023. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Continued To Apr-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer And Crosscomplaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Joseph Jyoo (Also Filed By Cross Defendant Motive Technologies, Inc.)
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.'s motion to strike answer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.'s response to the answer is now due by June 16, 2023.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOSEPH JYOO, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed (Tel: 818-990-0888) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT 1MTX, LLC.

The Court denies plaintiff's counsel's request to address the Court, as plaintiff's counsel did not give notice to the other parties of his intent to appear.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted as unopposed.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
